markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss Datagrid's social media strategy and content planning for LinkedIn posts.](https://fathom.video/share/uxyyPs6s7yR4VsQY_KZh6FxZWow9p9bV?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Thiago's personal posts on company building and AI insights perform well, driving engagement and leads](https://fathom.video/share/uxyyPs6s7yR4VsQY_KZh6FxZWow9p9bV?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)
  - [Video demos of Datagrid's AI agent capabilities are highly effective content](https://fathom.video/share/uxyyPs6s7yR4VsQY_KZh6FxZWow9p9bV?tab=summary&timestamp=701.0)
  - [The company account should focus on AI-related topics and engage more with employee/customer posts](https://fathom.video/share/uxyyPs6s7yR4VsQY_KZh6FxZWow9p9bV?tab=summary&timestamp=2043.0)
  - [Content strategy will emphasize unique use cases, customer stories, and Thiago's insights on AI/business building](https://fathom.video/share/uxyyPs6s7yR4VsQY_KZh6FxZWow9p9bV?tab=summary&timestamp=1429.0)

## Topics

### Personal LinkedIn Performance

  - [Posts on company building and AI insights perform best](https://fathom.video/share/uxyyPs6s7yR4VsQY_KZh6FxZWow9p9bV?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)
  - [Generate business leads and customer engagement](https://fathom.video/share/uxyyPs6s7yR4VsQY_KZh6FxZWow9p9bV?tab=summary&timestamp=579.0)
  - [Video demos (e.g. AI agent for construction) get strong engagement (101 reactions, 10k impressions)](https://fathom.video/share/uxyyPs6s7yR4VsQY_KZh6FxZWow9p9bV?tab=summary&timestamp=737.0)
  - [Posts serve multiple purposes: customer awareness, recruitment, VC interest](https://fathom.video/share/uxyyPs6s7yR4VsQY_KZh6FxZWow9p9bV?tab=summary&timestamp=721.0)

### Datagrid AI Agent Capabilities

  - [Can work with massive datasets (25GB, 100k+ pages) to find specific information quickly](https://fathom.video/share/uxyyPs6s7yR4VsQY_KZh6FxZWow9p9bV?tab=summary&timestamp=1518.0)
  - [Uses knowledge graphs and semantic retrieval for accurate citations](https://fathom.video/share/uxyyPs6s7yR4VsQY_KZh6FxZWow9p9bV?tab=summary&timestamp=1636.0)
  - [Agentic system builds own plan to complete complex tasks across multiple tools](https://fathom.video/share/uxyyPs6s7yR4VsQY_KZh6FxZWow9p9bV?tab=summary&timestamp=1738.0)
  - [Example use cases: competitive analysis, expense categorization, construction project scheduling](https://fathom.video/share/uxyyPs6s7yR4VsQY_KZh6FxZWow9p9bV?tab=summary&timestamp=1488.0)

### Company LinkedIn Account Strategy

  - [Aim to emulate Clay's engaged social presence (commenting widely on relevant posts)](https://fathom.video/share/uxyyPs6s7yR4VsQY_KZh6FxZWow9p9bV?tab=summary&timestamp=2049.0)
  - [Focus on AI topics, avoid signaling about competitors](https://fathom.video/share/uxyyPs6s7yR4VsQY_KZh6FxZWow9p9bV?tab=summary&timestamp=2055.0)
  - [Increase engagement with employee/customer posts about Datagrid](https://fathom.video/share/uxyyPs6s7yR4VsQY_KZh6FxZWow9p9bV?tab=summary&timestamp=2214.0)
  - [Develop a light, humorous tone for company account interactions](https://fathom.video/share/uxyyPs6s7yR4VsQY_KZh6FxZWow9p9bV?tab=summary&timestamp=2198.0)

### Content Planning Process

  - [Thiago prefers reacting to drafted posts rather than writing initial content](https://fathom.video/share/uxyyPs6s7yR4VsQY_KZh6FxZWow9p9bV?tab=summary&timestamp=2000.0)
  - [Will quickly approve high-quality, unique ideas aligned with core themes](https://fathom.video/share/uxyyPs6s7yR4VsQY_KZh6FxZWow9p9bV?tab=summary&timestamp=2287.0)
  - [Core content themes: building the business, overcoming challenges, AI's impact on work/society](https://fathom.video/share/uxyyPs6s7yR4VsQY_KZh6FxZWow9p9bV?tab=summary&timestamp=2329.0)
  - [Aim for substance over high posting volume](https://fathom.video/share/uxyyPs6s7yR4VsQY_KZh6FxZWow9p9bV?tab=summary&timestamp=2316.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX team to draft posts and add directly to content calendar for review](https://fathom.video/share/uxyyPs6s7yR4VsQY_KZh6FxZWow9p9bV?tab=summary&timestamp=2412.0)
  - [Kaitlin to add GrowthX team as managers on Datagrid company LinkedIn account](https://fathom.video/share/uxyyPs6s7yR4VsQY_KZh6FxZWow9p9bV?tab=summary&timestamp=2274.0)
  - [Develop more video demos and customer use case content](https://fathom.video/share/uxyyPs6s7yR4VsQY_KZh6FxZWow9p9bV?tab=summary&timestamp=1804.0)
  - [Thiago to share relevant links/ideas in Slack for potential posts](https://fathom.video/share/uxyyPs6s7yR4VsQY_KZh6FxZWow9p9bV?tab=summary&timestamp=2455.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up to refine company account persona after initial posting](https://fathom.video/share/uxyyPs6s7yR4VsQY_KZh6FxZWow9p9bV?tab=summary&timestamp=2240.0)
